name: The Fool

standard.meaning: The start of a new journey that may require a leap of faith.
standard.reversedMeaning: Caution can be a prison, but it can also be a good thing. It can be hard to know in the moment whether the cliff ahead is a leap of faith or just a cliff.
standard.personalMeaning: Is it a stumble or a leap of faith? Is he careless or carefree? He's full of curiosity and open to possibilities, but that's no guarantee things will end well. There's no sign yet what the outcome will be, but isn't that what makes it exciting?

lyric:
Found yourself in a new direction
Arrows falling from the sun
Canyon calling, would they come to greet you?
Let you know you're not the only one - Beach House, Myth

name: The Magician

standard.meaning: You have all the tools needed, you now need to apply your willpower to manifest what you desire.
standard.reversedMeaning: Appearing competent isn't the same as being competent. Treading water doesn't move anyone forward.
standard.personalMeaning: There's a moment when practice becomes competence, when the training starts clicking into place.

lyric:
Here we are
One magical movement
From Kether to Malkuth. - David Bowie, Station to Station

name: The High Priestess

standard.meaning: What is hidden has not been revealed yet, you may need to exercise patience or use your intuition.
standard.reversedMeaning: A moment of calm may be needed. Take time to reacquaint yourself with yourself.
standard.personalMeaning: Saying nothing doesn't mean you have nothing worth saying. Feeling can reveal things just as well as thinking.

lyric:
You'll hang the hearts black and dull as the night
We hanged your pass and start being as you
(Still being cried and laughed at before) - Cocteau Twins, Cherry-Coloured Funk

name: The Empress

standard.meaning: This is a time of abundance, fertility, and sensuality. Creative growth is possible.
standard.reversedMeaning: Ineptitude can grow from too much comfort. There's nothing wrong with being comfortable, but one should maintain the ability to deal with hardship.
standard.personalMeaning: Is self denial a virtue or is just self denial? There's nothing wrong with indulging when there's an abundance.
standard.personalReversedMeaning: Don't mistake indulgence for 'self care', it's time to pull back and focus on what actually improves life in the long term, not just right now, this instant.

daily.dailyMeaning: Take a walk and get some fresh air. Eat something indulgent but healthy, take some time to think about what you want out of your home life.
daily.dailyReversedMeaning: Now's the time to pull back and eat some vegetables for a change. Avoid the shops.

positional.familyAndFriends: Your loved ones may need more from you, work on creating a nurturing environment for them.
positional.finalOutcomeMeaning: You may not feel it yet, but your future gains will surpass your expectations.
positional.futureMeaning: Success and healing are on their way, patience may be needed until then.
positional.hopesAndFearsMeaning: You work hard now so one day you won't have to.
positional.influencesMeaning: Cultivate a nurturing partnership in order to succeed.
positional.negativeMeaning: Your intuition needs you to pay attention to it, rather than dismiss it.
positional.obstacleMeaning: Patience and optimism is needed as you embark on new projects.
positional.pastMeaning: You've been able to start projects in the past and develop skills that you'll soon need again.
positional.possibleOutcome: The seeds you've sown will inevitably sprout, it's time to work towards a happier home life.
positional.presentMeaning: Now is a time of comfort and nesting. Rely on intution rather than cold, hard logic.
positional.recentMeaning: A promising venture is underway, hold onto your optimism.

subject.adviceMeaning: Spend time in nature, start new projects, pay attention to budding relationships.
subject.careerMeaning: Use this time to develop skills and learn new things. It's a time for planting seeds that can one day sprout.
subject.financeMeaning: Long term investments beat get rich quick schemes. Make your money grow but go into any ventures with your head on straight and your mind on the future.
subject.healthMeaning: Pay attention to nutrition. Healthy meals can still be delicious. Pay attention to your feelings and indulge in something good for you.
subject.loveMeaning: Lay the foundation for a deeper relationship. Create a collaborative and soothing environment for yourself and your partner or interest.

lyric:
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face, and electric soul - Lana Del Rey

standard.reversedMeaning: Systems that serve no purpose become a hindrance rather than a help.
standard.personalMeaning: Those who keep the structure are the ones aware of it. The parents are aware of the household maintenance, not the children. The generals are aware of thwarted wars, not the civilians. For those who maintain the structure, it can be suffocating and for everyone else, it's invisible.
